element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core mechanic defining narrative branches and party composition throughout game
Attack gauge fills during combat, unlocks character-specific special attacks
Menu system for equipment, spells, items; game pauses during menu access
Magic effectiveness depends on character magical ability and spell element vs. enemy type
Player chooses which stat (strength, evasion, etc.) to increase at each level-up

element_introduction_order.element: Mana Stones and class system (Light/Dark branches)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: First class change at level 18; optional second change at level 38 with rare item requirement
Days cycle rapidly; each day associated with elemental spirit; affects magic strength, enemy spawns, NPC availability, Kevin's werewolf transformation at night
Black markets available only at night; enemies sleep/change by time; strategic day-skip via inns
Legendary creatures whose unleashing drives central plot; defeat required to claim Mana Sword
Central objective; obtaining sword central to all three character storylines

typical_relief_triggers: Using inns to skip to evening/morning
typical_tension_triggers: Forced timed events during specific weekdays
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Story-driven action-RPG with three overlapping narratives creating variable tension; calendar system adds time-pressure elements; class system timing (levels 18 and 38) provides progression gates

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Mana Stones for class changes can be visited at player discretion after level 18

difficulty_curve.early_game: Fundamental mechanics introduced: basic combat, party assembly, Ring Commands; navigation learning phase
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Class system unlocked at level 18; elemental system complexity increases; multiple narrative branches active
difficulty_curve.late_game: Optional second class change at level 38 available; final Benevodon encounters; narrative convergence of three storylines
notable_spikes: Class change decision points (high mechanical impact)
Final boss sequence with multiple story paths

notable_level_patterns.description: Game opens with choice of 3 of 6 possible main characters; each selection creates distinct story progression and NPC encounters; remaining characters become NPCs when met
Calendar system with elemental days creates variable enemy spawns, NPC availability, and special events; day/night cycle unlocks location-specific content (black markets only at night)
Mandatory progression milestone at level 18 with Light/Dark branch choice affecting future stat growth and abilities; optional second change at level 38 behind rare item lock
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Multiple Mana Stone locations mid-to-late game

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Top-down exploration with AI companion management
notable_level_patterns.description: Player controls one of three party members in real-time top-down perspective; other two controlled by AI; character switching available at any time for tactical flexibility
